arts.ttl: Man United, Chelsea, Liverpool and Spurs eyeing 20-year-old winger with 13-G/A this season
arts.sum: Premier League clubs Chelsea, Liverpool, Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly keeping tabs on Velez Sarsfield winger Thiago Fernandez. Fernandez has been compared to the Argentine international Angel Di Maria because of the stylistic similarities between the two players. arts.ttl: Chelsea line up Osimhen in deal of the century
arts.sum: However, Napoli ’s initial asking price of around €100 million proved restrictive, while the player’s wage demands are thought to have prevented a deal being struck in the final hours of the transfer window. A transfer at the rumoured price for Osimhen could prove the deal of the century for Chelsea even with Jackson’s form, particularly if the Nigerian recaptures the form that saw him lead Napoli to the Serie A title in 2023.

arts.ttl: Noni Madueke and Moises Caicedo drop Chelsea team news hint as Enzo Maresca confirms injury blow
arts.sum: One player who won't feature against Brighton is Reece James; speaking to reporters ahead of the match, Maresca provided an injury update . Nevertheless, Madueke and Caicedo have posted pre-match graphic previews of the Seagulls fixture to their respective Instagram stories.
